title: mcp-rune design manifest
description: Single source of truth for design exports committed under designs/. Validated by designs/scripts/validate-designs.mjs (npm run designs:check).

slug.description: Folder name under designs/ holding this export.

name.description: Human title of the design as it appears in claude.ai/design.

source.description: The claude.ai/design URL this bundle was exported from. Provenance only — never fetched at runtime.

version.description: Designer-facing version of the snapshot (e.g. v3).

exportedAt.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) the export was taken. Makes drift visible.

files.description: Bundle files (relative to designs/<slug>/) that matter. Each must exist on disk.

implements.description: App slugs under src/mcp/apps/ this design drives. Each must exist.

notes.description: Optional free-form note, e.g. which shared tokens the design maps to.
